title: Master Shift-Left and Shift-Right Strategies
description: Design a software development lifecycle that integrates shift-left quality practices like static analysis. Implement shift-right strategies, including Canary releases and Feature Flags, for effective testing in production.
objectives: Design a software development lifecycle that integrates shift-left quality practices like static analysis.
Implement shift-right strategies, including Canary releases and Feature Flags, for effective testing in production.
